markets.rules_primary: If the temperature recorded at Central Park, New York City for Jun 18, 2026 4 PM EDT as reported by The Weather Company (for coordinates KNYC), is above 96.99°, then the market resolves to Yes.

Use caution when interpreting preliminary Weather Company readings.
